requirement_topic.zh: GSO 采用的 IEC/CISPR 电磁兼容
requirement_topic.zht: GSO 採用的 IEC/CISPR 電磁相容

summary.en: Motor-driven tools, electronic speed controllers, chargers, and power supplies placed on the Bahrain market are expected to meet electromagnetic compatibility requirements based on GSO standards that adopt the relevant IEC/CISPR emission and immunity standards. The product should not generate excessive electromagnetic disturbance and should have adequate immunity, with EMC evidence forming part of the BSMD conformity file.
summary.zh: 投放巴林市场的电机驱动工具、电子调速器、充电器和电源应满足电磁兼容要求，依据采用相关 IEC/CISPR 发射与抗扰度标准的 GSO 标准。产品不得产生过量电磁骚扰，并应具备足够抗扰度，EMC 证据应纳入 BSMD 符合性文件。
summary.zht: 投放巴林市場的電機驅動工具、電子調速器、充電器和電源應滿足電磁相容要求，依據採用相關 IEC/CISPR 發射與抗擾度標準的 GSO 標準。產品不得產生過量電磁騷擾，並應具備足夠抗擾度，EMC 證據應納入 BSMD 符合性文件。

standards_or_laws: GSO standards adopting the relevant IEC/CISPR electromagnetic compatibility standards
BSMD national conformity / registration under MOIC, covering EMC where applicable

summary.en: China compliance packages may include EMC reports alongside GB/T 3883 safety reports, often based on GB equivalents of CISPR emission and immunity standards. Test limits, configuration, worst-case operating modes, charger inclusion, and conformity-file mapping still need Bahrain-specific review against the GSO-adopted set.
summary.zh: 中国合规包可能在 GB/T 3883 安全报告之外包含 EMC 报告，通常基于 CISPR 发射与抗扰度标准的 GB 等同标准。测试限值、配置、最不利工况、是否包含充电器以及符合性文件映射仍需按 GSO 采用的标准集进行巴林专项复核。
summary.zht: 中國合規包可能在 GB/T 3883 安全報告之外包含 EMC 報告，通常基於 CISPR 發射與抗擾度標準的 GB 等同標準。測試限值、配置、最不利工況、是否包含充電器以及符合性文件映射仍需按 GSO 採用的標準集進行巴林專項覆核。

standards_or_laws: GB equivalents of CISPR EMC emission and immunity standards where applicable

gap.en: A frequent gap is an EMC report that tests only the bare tool but omits the charger, battery pack, electronic controller variants, or worst-case load. Because both sides trace to CISPR, the technical limits usually align, so the work is confirming scope and configuration and folding the EMC evidence into the BSMD conformity file rather than re-testing to a wholly different limit set.
gap.zh: 常见差距是 EMC 报告只测试裸工具，而遗漏充电器、电池包、电子控制器变体或最不利负载。由于双方均溯源至 CISPR，技术限值通常一致，因此工作重点是确认范围和配置，并将 EMC 证据并入 BSMD 符合性文件，而非按完全不同的限值集重新测试。
gap.zht: 常見差距是 EMC 報告只測試裸工具，而遺漏充電器、電池包、電子控制器變體或最不利負載。由於雙方均溯源至 CISPR，技術限值通常一致，因此工作重點是確認範圍和配置，並將 EMC 證據併入 BSMD 符合性文件，而非按完全不同的限值集重新測試。

target.en: EMC compliance based on GSO-adopted IEC/CISPR standards is expected for in-scope apparatus as part of BSMD national conformity under MOIC.
target.zh: 适用设备须满足基于 GSO 采用的 IEC/CISPR 标准的 EMC 合规，作为 MOIC 下属 BSMD 国家符合性的一部分。
target.zht: 適用設備須滿足基於 GSO 採用的 IEC/CISPR 標準的 EMC 合規，作為 MOIC 下屬 BSMD 國家符合性的一部分。

cn.en: China domestic files may include EMC evidence based on GB equivalents of CISPR standards, but Bahrain acceptance depends on scope, limits, configuration, and conformity-file mapping.
cn.zh: 中国境内文件可包含基于 CISPR 标准 GB 等同标准的 EMC 证据，但巴林接受性取决于范围、限值、配置和符合性文件映射。
cn.zht: 中國境內文件可包含基於 CISPR 標準 GB 等同標準的 EMC 證據，但巴林接受性取決於範圍、限值、配置和符合性文件映射。

source.publisher: Kingdom of Bahrain, Ministry of Industry and Commerce (MOIC) / Bahrain Standards and Metrology Directorate (BSMD)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Not yet Bahrain-ready until EMC evidence covers the actual marketed tool system, is mapped to the GSO-adopted IEC/CISPR standards, and is incorporated into the BSMD national conformity file.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在 EMC 证据覆盖实际销售的工具系统、映射至 GSO 采用的 IEC/CISPR 标准并纳入 BSMD 国家符合性文件之前，尚未达到巴林就绪。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在 EMC 證據覆蓋實際銷售的工具系統、映射至 GSO 採用的 IEC/CISPR 標準並納入 BSMD 國家符合性文件之前，尚未達到巴林就緒。
